title: Isomorphic Strings
description: Given a string x containing two words separated by a comma (e.g., 'egg,add'), determine if the two words are isomorphic. Two strings are isomorphic if the characters in the first can be replaced to get the second.
inputFormat: Two strings separated by a comma
hint: Split the string by the comma. Use two HashMaps to track character mappings from Word A to Word B, and Word B to Word A to prevent two characters mapping to the same letter.
